meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Passive Income to Solve Project Stall
content.seo_description: Stop project stall with this intermediate guide. Leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to build scalable, passive income streams that impress clients instantly.
content.answer_block: To overcome project stall, pivot from bespoke service work to productized micro-SaaS. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative development, you can automate deployment and maintenance, turning one-off client solutions into recurring passive revenue streams that scale without additional manual effort.
content.intro:
The graveyard of unfinished projects is paved with good intentions and broken code. As a freelancer, you're trapped in a cycle of trading hours for dollars, watching your most ambitious ideas wither because you lack the bandwidth to cross the finish line. It’s a silent, draining attrition that kills your creative spirit.

But the tide is turning. By shifting your workflow toward automated, productized architecture, you stop building for one client and start building for the market. This isn't just about finishing; it's about building systems that work while you sleep. Welcome to the era of the autonomous AI Builder.

steps.title: Define the Micro-SaaS Scope
steps.description: Identify a repetitive task from your past client projects. Narrow the scope to a single, high-value problem that can be solved with a lean, automated micro-SaaS.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project history and identify the most repetitive backend logic that can be abstracted into a standalone, subscription-based micro-SaaS tool.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze project files in ./src to extract reusable service logic for a new micro-SaaS module'

steps.title: Rapid Scaffolding with Antigravity
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the boilerplate, authentication, and database schema, ensuring your foundation is production-ready from minute one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a scalable boilerplate for a micro-SaaS using Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe, including user management and subscription billing logic.

steps.title: Automate Logic with Claude Code
steps.description: Delegate the implementation of complex business logic to Claude Code, ensuring high-quality code that follows clean architecture principles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement the core logic for the subscription fulfillment service, ensuring it integrates securely with the Stripe webhook listener.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement stripe webhook handler with robust error logging and user subscription state updates'

steps.title: Integrate Passive Monitoring
steps.description: Set up automated monitoring and alerting so the system manages itself, freeing you from constant maintenance cycles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add automated health checks and log reporting for the API endpoints, sending alerts to Discord if latency exceeds 500ms.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'configure health check middleware and integrate with discord webhook for system monitoring'

steps.title: Deploy to Global Edge
steps.description: Push your finished product to the edge to ensure low latency and high availability, essential for passive income stability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate the deployment configuration for a global edge environment, optimizing for cold-start performance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'prepare deployment manifests for vercel edge functions and optimize build settings'

pro_tips: Always build for the '80/20' rule; solve 80% of the problem with 20% of the features to ensure launch speed.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you write; self-documenting systems are easier to maintain as passive income assets.
Implement feature flags from day one; they allow you to test new revenue streams without risking the stability of existing ones.
Connect your Stripe dashboard to a Slack/Discord channel for real-time 'passive' dopamine hits that keep you motivated.
Treat your codebase like a product, not a service; refactor every two weeks using AI to keep technical debt at zero.
content.next_steps: After completing your deployment, focus on setting up a landing page and one high-leverage marketing channel to drive traffic to your new passive income tool.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your best ideas die in a folder. Build, deploy, and scale your way to financial independence using the tools the pros use. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
